artifacts.role: accepted Haxe PHP bootstrap lifecycle ADR
progress rollup for compiler-pressure bootstrap policy

follow_up_gates.scope: include path, SPL autoload order, repeated bootstrap, and multi-shell idempotence
warning, notice, error-handler, and HAXE_CUSTOM_ERROR_HANDLER behavior
stack traces, source maps, and debug/parity/release profile behavior

claims: ADR-014 treats stock Haxe PHP bootstrap as observable WordPress request-state behavior.
Broad WPHX public-shell distribution claims are blocked on include-path/autoload, warning/error-handler, and stack-trace/source-map probes.
Current per-shell bootstrap blocks remain acceptable for bounded fixtures and leaf candidates when their non-claims are recorded.
non_claims: This receipt does not prove runtime bootstrap behavior.
This receipt does not claim WordPress Core distribution bootstrap safety.
This receipt does not claim the stock Haxe PHP error handler is WordPress-compatible by default.
